interface: Blob Storage REST API, service version x-ms-version: 2026-04-06 (latest fully deployed version as of research)

common_headers.x-ms-version: 2026-04-06 -- required on every authorized request (OAuth requests need 2017-11-09 or later)
common_headers.Authorization: Bearer {token} (Microsoft Entra); tests use a dummy token

put_block.blockid: valid Base64, at most 64 bytes BEFORE encoding, URL-encoded in the query string, and the SAME pre-encoded length for every block in a blob (differing lengths -> 400)
put_block.body: the raw block content; Content-Length required (411 when missing)
put_block.conditional_headers: NOT supported on Put Block -- If-Match and friends must not be sent when staging
put_block.uncommitted_lifetime: blocks staged on a new blob are garbage-collected after 7 days without a commit

lookup_elements.Committed: search only the committed list; missing -> 400
lookup_elements.Uncommitted: search only the uncommitted list; missing -> 400
lookup_elements.Latest: search the uncommitted list first, then the committed list

put_block_list.ordering: the element order in the XML defines the byte order of the committed blob
put_block_list.blob_headers: x-ms-blob-content-type sets the blob's Content-Type (defaults to application/octet-stream when never set)
put_block_list.conditional_headers: If-Match, If-None-Match, If-Modified-Since, If-Unmodified-Since supported; unmet write condition -> 412 Precondition Failed; If-None-Match: * commits only when the blob does not exist
put_block_list.uncommitted_cleanup: blocks not named in the committed list are garbage-collected after a successful commit

get_block_list.default_blocklisttype: committed when the parameter is omitted
get_block_list.uncommitted_order: alphabetical; a block id uploaded more than once appears once with the most recent content
get_block_list.etag: ETag/Last-Modified returned only when the blob has committed blocks

errors.invalid_block_list: 400 InvalidBlockList when a named block cannot be found

test_fixture_notes.block_id_scheme: base64("block-" + zero-padded 8-digit block index), e.g. base64("block-00000000")
